zh.lifeSummary: Alexander Home 1st Lord Home是Alexander Home of Home and Dunglass和Janet Hay的兒子，於1408年出生在英國蘇格蘭凱特內斯。他於1426年4月11日之前與Marion Lauder結婚。他去世於1482年在英國蘇格蘭費伏享年74歲。

nameMeanings.name: Home
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Hume  .

English: habitational name from Home in Clifton on Teme or in Feckenham (Worcestershire) or from a minor place similarly named, a variant of Hamm (from Middle English ham(me), with rounding of the vowel before the nasal consonant to give hom(me)).

variants.name: Hume
meanings: Scottish (Lowlands) and northern English: variant of Hulme , with loss of l before the bilabial consonant /m/, as in the vocabulary word calm. See Holm and Home .

Scottish: habitational name either from the barony of Home or from Hume (or Home) in Berwickshire, from which the barony took its name. The placename derives from Old English hōum, dative plural form of hōh ‘heel, spur of land’.
History: A family of this name (see 2 above) have held the Earldom of Home since 1605.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: Alexander Home 1st Lord Home was born in 1408, in Caithness, Scotland, United Kingdom as the son of Alexander Home of Home and Dunglass and Janet Hay. He married Marion Lauder before 11 April 1426. He died in 1482, in Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 74.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Home 1st Lord Homeは1408年にイギリススコットランドケイスネスでAlexander Home of Home and DunglassとJanet Hayの息子として生まれた。1426年4月11日以前にMarion Lauderと結婚した。彼は1482年にイギリススコットランドフィフで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Home 1st Lord Home(은)는 1408년 영국 스코틀랜드 케이스네스에서 Alexander Home of Home and Dunglass(와)과 Janet Hay의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1426년 4월 11일 이전 Marion Lauder(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1482년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Alexander Home 1st Lord Home родился в 1408 г. в местности цеитнесс, Шотландия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Alexander Home of Home and Dunglass и Janet Hay. Он женился на женщине по имени Marion Lauder перед 11 апрель 1426 г. Он умер в 1482 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет.
